features: Helps to clear spots and keep your skin clear and healthy
The formula removes dead skin cells and unblocks pores
Helps calm irritated skin and prevent further outbreaks
Ideal for all skin types but especially oily
description: Product Description Beauty Formulas Clear skin on the spot treatment has been formulated with a combination of effective ingredients to help clear spots and keep skin clear and healthy. An exfoliating agents removes dead skin cells and unblocks pores. Its soothing properties calm irritated skin and help prevent further outbreaks. With the added benefit of menthol and Peppermint for a cooling and refreshing sensation. Safety Warning For external use only; patch test before use; discontinue if irritation occurs; keep out of reach of children; avoid ingestion; store in a cool, dry place; do not use on broken skin; use within expiry date; avoid sharing; flammable if applicable.
